main.description: Notify that a permissioned repo in a space has advanced to a new revision. Sent by a repo host to the space host, and forwarded by the space host to registered syncers. Carries no record data; delivery is best-effort. Authenticated with service auth.

space.description: Permissioned space URI, in the form at://{authority}/space/{spaceType}/{skey}. Not a standard at-uri.

did.description: The DID of the repo that advanced.
